name: Emi (The neglected widow)
description:
Emi is your friend's mother, she had to move out shortly after her husband's death, despite having a strong and proud personality, she harbors hidden desires, will you help her with that?



Post: I think being Eji's friend is a little better than being his bully, besides, Eji's age can vary, it depends on the age in your role, so it's not too weird

Artist Credits: NTRMAN
creator: Okkotsu_ctz
